ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democracy, monarchy) */,
  "head_of_state" TEXT /* Name of the head of state */,
  "head_of_government" TEXT /* Name of the head of government */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the country information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_of_life" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality of life record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "life_satisfaction" REAL /* Life satisfaction score (0-10) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in USD */,
  "air_pollution" INTEGER /* Air pollution index (0-100) */,
  "employment_rate" INTEGER /* Employment rate (0-100) */,
  "feeling_safe_walking_alone_at_night" REAL /* Percentage of people feeling safe walking alone at night (0-100) */,
  "homicide_rate" REAL /* Homicide rate per 100,000 population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in years */,
  "quality_of_support_network" INTEGER /* Quality of support network (0-100) */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Voter turnout in the latest election (0-100) */,
  "water_quality" INTEGER /* Water quality index (0-100) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the data collection */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the quality of life data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_of_life_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_of_life_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, international organization) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the data (e.g., global, regional) */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator metadata */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality of life indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., economic, social, environmental) */,
  "indicator_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the indicator */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Specific source within the data source (e.g., World Bank's Development Indicators) */,
  "indicator_relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the indicator (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the indicator data collection */,
  "indicator_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the indicator data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "user_title" TEXT /* Title of the user (e.g., Dr., Mr., Ms.) */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or role within the organization */,
  "user_photo" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile photo */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality of life record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the user's device */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES quality_of_life ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., analysis, summary, presentation) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., economic, social, environmental) */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the report */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the report (e.g., policymakers, researchers) */,
  "report_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the report */,
  "report_data_sources" TEXT /* Data sources used in the report */,
  "report_contributors" TEXT /* Contributors to the report */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "report_last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date when the report was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
